Powering Boise homes and businesses with reliable electrical services. Safety and expertise are our top priorities.

Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Tier 1 Electric installed new recessed lighting in our kitchen, and it looks fantastic! The electrician was professional, efficient, and cleaned up after the job. Highly recommend!

D
David P.

Our old electrical panel was outdated, so we called Tier 1 Electric for an upgrade. The process was smooth and straightforward. They explained everything clearly and completed the job on time. Great service!

J
Jessica L.

We had a power outage in our home, and Tier 1 Electric responded quickly. The electrician found the problem (a faulty circuit breaker) and fixed it promptly. Very professional and reliable!

M
Michael K.

Tier 1 Electric rewired our entire home during a remodel. They did an excellent job, and we're very happy with the results. The electricians were knowledgeable, courteous, and paid attention to detail.

Additional Electrician Services

Electrical Repair Electrical Installation Lighting Services Panel Upgrades

Tier 1 Electric — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every electrician project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Tier 1 Electric Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific electrician needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Boise & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Boise, ID and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Boise Meridian Nampa Caldwell Eagle Star Middleton Emmett
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrician services.

How quickly can you respond to an emergency repair?

We prioritize emergency repairs and strive to arrive at your location as quickly as possible, typically within an hour depending on your location in the Boise area.

What types of electrical repairs do you handle?

We handle all types of electrical repairs, including outlet repair, circuit breaker replacement, wiring issues, lighting problems, and more.

Are your electricians licensed and insured?

Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured to provide electrical services in Boise, ID.

Built on Boise Values

Contact us to discuss your electrical needs and receive a no-obligation quote.

Let's Begin →
